buildCommand: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build

GROQ_API_KEY.description: Groq API key for text chat LLM

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Google Gemini API key for OCR

SARVAM_API_KEY.description: Sarvam AI API key for Indian language STT/TTS

MYSCHEME_API_KEY.description: myScheme.gov.in API key for government schemes
